query:
SELECT 
  executionType,
  status,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(itemsScraped) as total_items,
  SUM(newItems) as total_new_items
FROM scrapingLogs 
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-02-15 12:00:00'
GROUP BY executionType, status
ORDER BY executionType, status;
command:
